hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r CMD; BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "master" ]; then exit 0; fi; git fetch origin main --quiet 2>/dev/null; if ! git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main HEAD 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Branch is not rebased on origin/main. Run: git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main"}'; fi; }
